name: 配平方程式
subject: chemistry
domain_name: Unit 3-4 分子间作用力与反应 IMF & Reactions
curriculum_points: 1.1.A Calculate quantities of a substance or its relative number of particles using dimensional analysis and the mole concept.

1.1.A.2 Avogadro’s number ( N A = 6.022 × 1 0 23 m o l − 1 ) provides the connection between the number of moles in a pure sample of a substance and the number of constituent particles (or formula units) of that substance.

1.1.A.3 Expressing the mass of an individual atom or molecule in atomic mass units (amu) is useful because the average mass in amu of one particle (atom or molecule) or formula unit of a substance will always be numerically equal to the molar mass of that substance in grams. Thus, there is a quantitative connection between the mass of a substance and the number of particles that the substance contains.

1.1.A.3 Expressing the mass of an individual atom or molecule in atomic mass units (amu) is useful because the average mass in amu of one particle (atom or molecule) or formula unit of a substance will always be numerically equal to the molar mass of that substance in grams. Thus, there is a quantitative connection between the mass of a substance and the number of particles that the substance contains.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「配平方程式」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：1.1.A Calculate quantities of a substance or its relative number of particles using dimensional analysis and the mole co…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：1.1.A.2 Avogadro’s number ( N A = 6.022 × 1 0 23 m o l − 1 ) provides the connec… 对理解「配平方程式」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
